headline: Apple beats estimates and raises full-year guidance
body: Apple reported margin expansion across products and strong demand trends, with services revenue at a record high.

headline: Analysts upgrade Apple on services momentum
body: Multiple sell-side analysts raised price targets citing recurring services revenue and stable hardware mix.

headline: Tesla margin compression worries persist
body: Tesla guidance acknowledged ongoing pricing headwinds and noted caution around near-term demand.

headline: Retail chatter mixed after Tesla product event
body: Social sentiment showed volatile reactions, with bulls citing roadmap clarity and bears flagging execution risk.

headline: Microsoft posts strong cloud growth and raises guidance
body: Microsoft reported accelerating Azure growth and improved full-year guidance with continued enterprise demand.

headline: Microsoft launches new enterprise AI platform feature
body: The release expands enterprise tooling and is positioned as a margin-accretive product update.

headline: Nvidia beat earnings expectations and raised guidance
body: Nvidia reported record revenue driven by data-center demand and provided an above-consensus outlook.

headline: Amazon beats revenue estimates and raises guidance
body: Amazon highlighted AWS strength and operating margin expansion alongside steady retail trends.
